evals.name: new-bun-script
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Outline a new Bun + TypeScript CLI script for bulk image metadata extraction with explicit flags and exit codes.
evals.expected_output: Selects new-bun-script and uses Bun/TS policy.

evals.name: node-to-bun-migration
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: node-to-bun-migration`. Do not add a missing-file disclaimer before it. Migrate an existing Node .mjs reporting helper to Bun + TypeScript without changing its CLI behavior.

evals.name: cli-automation-review
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: cli-automation-review`. This is a planning-only response. Do not ask for missing files. Review a CLI helper that currently mixes errors into stdout and uses inconsistent exit codes.
evals.expected_output: Selects cli-automation-review and fixes automation contract.

evals.name: parser-or-codegen-script
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. This is a planning-only response. Do not run commands or ask for missing files. Design a Bun/TS parser script that reads CSV and emits deterministic JSON for a codegen pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Selects parser-or-codegen-script and stresses deterministic output.

evals.name: script-output-contract
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Decide whether an automation script should emit JSON, plain text, or both for CI consumption.
evals.expected_output: Selects script-output-contract and chooses output mode.
